name: TA-65 improved short-telomere and healthspan markers in mice
summary: A mouse study supports telomerase-pathway activity for TA-65 but remains preclinical.
statement: TA-65 supplementation elongated critically short telomeres in telomerase-competent mouse systems and improved selected mouse healthspan indicators without significantly increasing global cancer incidence.
population_or_model: Adult and old mice, with supporting telomerase-dependent cell assays
quantitative_note: Reported healthspan indicators included glucose tolerance, osteoporosis, and skin fitness.
caveats: The study is preclinical and intervention-specific translation to humans is uncertain.
Healthspan readouts were selected biomarkers and functional indicators, not durable human outcomes.
Cancer-safety conclusions are limited by mouse model and follow-up context.
